classes_and_oop

QUESTION:
What will be the output of the following code? 

```python
class Parent:
    def __init__(self, name):
        self.name = name

class Child(Parent):
    def __init__(self, name, age):
        super().__init__(name)
        self.age = age

obj = Child('Alice', 10)
print(obj.name)
```

Options:
  A. Alice
  B. 10
  C. Parent
  D. None
RESPONSE FORMAT:
